idea: A lonely robot builds another robot to make a friend
character_continuity: Small lonely inventor robot with warm amber eyes, brushed metal body, careful hands, and a gentle expressive face. The second robot is smaller, newly built, with soft blue eyes and simple rounded parts.
setting_continuity: Cozy moonlit repair workshop filled with spare parts, hanging tools, soft workbench lamps, rain-streaked windows, and warm family-friendly atmosphere.
tone_continuity: Tender, hopeful, whimsical 3D animated short with soft cinematic lighting, readable emotions, no text, no logos, no watermark.

scenes.story_beat: The lonely robot notices it has no one to share the workshop with.
scenes.visual: A small lonely inventor robot sits at a cluttered workbench in a cozy moonlit repair workshop, looking at two empty stools beside it while rain glows on the window.
scenes.camera_motion: slow gentle push in toward the robot's expressive amber eyes
scenes.style_notes: tender cinematic 3D animation, warm workbench lamp, blue moonlight through rainy window, family-friendly, no text, no logos, no watermark
scenes.voiceover: Every night, one little robot fixed everything in the workshop, except its own lonely heart.

scenes.story_beat: The robot carefully builds a second robot from spare parts.
scenes.visual: The inventor robot gently assembles a smaller companion robot from rounded spare parts, polishing a tiny metal hand under warm workbench light.
scenes.camera_motion: small sideways dolly across tools, gears, and the half-built friend
scenes.style_notes: cozy detailed workshop, polished but handmade robot parts, tender concentration, consistent inventor robot, no text, no logos, no watermark
scenes.voiceover: So it gathered bolts, wires, and courage, and began building someone to say hello to.

scenes.story_beat: The new robot wakes up for the first time.
scenes.visual: The smaller newly built robot opens soft blue eyes for the first time, a gentle spark of light reflecting in the inventor robot's amazed face.
scenes.camera_motion: quick soft reveal from the inventor robot's hands to the new robot's glowing eyes
scenes.style_notes: magical but grounded workshop lighting, gentle spark, emotional close-up, consistent two robot designs, no text, no logos, no watermark
scenes.voiceover: At last, a small blue light blinked back at it.

scenes.story_beat: The two robots awkwardly learn how to connect.
scenes.visual: The two robots sit facing each other on the workshop floor, shyly offering matching metal hands while scattered spare parts form a heart-like shape nearby.
scenes.camera_motion: slow warm arc around the two robots as their hands meet
scenes.style_notes: sweet awkward friendship moment, soft warm light, expressive eyes, no readable text, no logos, no watermark
scenes.voiceover: They did not know how friendship worked, so they started with one tiny hand.

scenes.story_beat: The robots share the morning together, no longer alone.
scenes.visual: At sunrise, the two small robots sit side by side on the workbench, sharing a glowing battery lantern and watching golden light fill the cozy workshop.
scenes.camera_motion: slow cinematic pull back to reveal the whole warm workshop around them
scenes.style_notes: hopeful ending, golden sunrise, cozy workshop, two consistent robot friends, family-friendly, no text, no logos, no watermark
scenes.voiceover: By morning, the workshop was still full of spare parts, but now it was also full of friendship.
